title: New agent profile button intermittently navigates to new chat instead of creating profile
description: When clicking the 'New agent profile' button on the Agent Profiles page, it sometimes navigates to the New Chat view instead of creating a new profile. On retry (navigating back to Agent Profiles and clicking again), it works correctly.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Navigate to Agent Profiles page
2. Click 'New agent profile' button
3. Observe that sometimes the app navigates to New Chat instead
expected: A new agent profile should be created and shown in the editing panel
actual: Sometimes navigates to New Chat view instead of creating profile
